fields.summary: Represents a four-byte OpenType tag encoded as a 32-bit unsigned integer.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> wraps a 32-bit unsigned integer that encodes four ASCII characters, as used throughout OpenType (e.g., 'wght' for font weight, 'kern' for kerning). It is implicitly convertible to and from <see cref="T:System.UInt32" />.

## Examples

```csharp
var weightAxis = new SKFourByteTag('w', 'g', 'h', 't');
var widthAxis  = SKFourByteTag.Parse("wdth");

SKFourByteTag fromUint = 0x77676874u; // same as 'wght'
Console.WriteLine(weightAxis.ToString()); // prints "wght"
```
]]></format>
